title: Add ccp_hop_vectors() to generate.py computing exact FNV hash_32 for ccp16-hop.json vectors
description: Implement function returning list of dicts with real computed hash_output values (no placeholders), matching synchronized_hop_channel logic from spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md and current lichen_hash_32 (little-endian epoch concat). Use existing _h helper. Reference test/vectors/ccp16-hop.json:6 and hash_32.json.
